name: Union Sanction Board
summary: Institution applying sanctions inside the Union successor trade network.
day_to_day: Reviews misconduct, issues market penalties, and pressures compliance with Union decisions.
who_works_there: Sanction clerks, arbiters, auditors, guild delegates.
who_uses_it: Guild members, merchants, complainants, disciplined actors.
authority: Can suspend access, levy penalties, and intensify scrutiny.
public_manifestation: Posted sanctions, appeal queues, market rumor, tense negotiation chambers.
conflict_or_bottleneck: A sanction system must appear even-handed or it becomes another factional tool.
